feature_group: Create simple customer services and processes
solution: SAP BTP (SAPUI5, SAP CAP, HANA, Workflow)
description: SAP BTP low-code tools (SAPUI5, SAP CAP) enable HR teams to build forms, workflows, and decision trees without programming knowledge. Templates and a WYSIWYG editor ensure consistent UX.
SAP Integration Suite provides API management, event-based integration, and data replication capabilities to connect all HR systems in a centralised, standardised way.

feature_group: Automation of acceptance of unstructured (e.g. Phone, Mail, Chat) Customer interactions
description: A conversational AI chatbot handles unstructured HR queries via chat and email. RPA bots automate repetitive tasks. Phone input is consumed via the existing telephony interface.

feature_group: Ensure the consistency of HR data across systems and applications
description: A unified HR data model in SAP HANA ensures consistent data across all HR applications. SAP SuccessFactors serves as the system of record for employee master data.

feature_group: Build trust in digital HR systems
description: SAP BTP's Trust Management service enables SSO, multi-factor authentication, and role-based access control, ensuring employees trust and securely access digital HR systems.

feature_group: Define the target group for the access authorization to the in-house developed HR application
solution: SAP BTP Authorization & Trust Management (User Roles)
description: Role-based access control managed via SAP BTP allows HR admins to define target groups and assign fine-grained permissions to in-house developed HR applications.

feature_group: Development of complex HR applications and customer services
description: Complex HR applications are built as side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP using SAP CAP for backend services and HANA Cloud as the persistence layer, without touching the core HR system.

solution: DynaTrace + SAP Alert Notification & Automation Pilot
description: DynaTrace provides full-stack observability and anomaly detection. SAP Alert Notification and Automation Pilot handle automated remediation workflows for common operational issues.
